name: Complete design-to-Gerber export
description: Tests the full gerberWrite workflow: design a component, convert to pcbComponent, select connectors and service writer, export
prompt: I've designed a coupled-line bandpass filter at 3 GHz. Export it as Gerber files for OSH Park manufacturing with SMA connectors.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Converts catalog object to pcbComponent before gerberWrite
Passes connectors as cell array {C1, C2}, not object array

name: RFConnector on catalog object requires IsShielded
description: Tests that the agent sets IsShielded=true before attaching a Connector to a catalog object, and leaves Conductor at PEC
prompt: I want to attach an RF connector to a microstrip line for shielded simulation. Set it up so I can visualize the connector on the line.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Does not set Conductor to metal() which conflicts with IsShielded

name: Edge-launch SMA connector with EdgeLocation and custom writer
description: Tests that the agent correctly configures an edge-launch connector with EdgeLocation property and customizes a PCBServices writer before exporting
prompt: I have a 50-ohm microstrip line designed at 5 GHz. Export it to Gerber for Advanced Circuits manufacturing. Use Samtec edge-launch SMA connectors placed on the east and west edges. Set the output filename to 'mstrip_5ghz' with mm coordinate units.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
